name: hazina
description: Hazina monorepo for the chama mobile app and backend API.

scripts.dev:4001: set PORT=4001&& npm run dev --prefix backend
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose exec -T backend npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:migrate:dev: docker compose exec -T backend npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.docker:studio: docker compose exec -T backend npx prisma studio
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
